name: Karotten in Bier Gedunstet (Carrots in Beer)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the carrots into long, thin slices.
2. Melt the butter in a medium-sized frying pan.
3. Add the beer and carrots to the pan.
4. Cook slowly until the carrots are tender, stirring frequently.
5. Stir in the salt and sugar.
6. Continue cooking for another 2 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
